diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, factory
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/factory.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper to chain handlers with type safety using generics
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/route.ts
+- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for getting matched routes and paths
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSContext, WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, upgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/websocket.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for Hono with event listeners and upgrade handlers
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/cookie.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie handling utilities for get, set, sign, and delete operations
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, '../../hono', '../../types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/client/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing client for creating HTTP test clients with custom fetch
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/node.ts, src/helper/adapter/deno.ts, src/helper/adapter/bun.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment access for different platforms
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, rawCssString, cx, css, keyframes, StyleTag, css
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, '../../jsx/constants', '../../jsx/dom/css', '../../utils/html', './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/css/dom/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with class name hashing and style tags
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, rawCssString, minify, ClassNameSlug
+- Reads as: (standalone)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS helper utilities with class name hashing and minifier
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, proxyRequest, ProxyFetch
+- Reads as: '../../http-exception', '../../utils/headers'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/proxy.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests to external servers
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, getRouterName, inspectRoutes
+- Reads as: '../../hono', '../../types', '../../utils/color', '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/dev.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for displaying routes and inspecting handlers
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: '../../utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/html.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML templating helper with template tags and escaping
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, disableSSG, onlySSG, ssgParams
+- Reads as: ../../plugins, './ssg', './middleware'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generator helper for generating static pages
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: generateStaticPages, ssg
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../utils/handler, './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for generating HTML pages from routes
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: (standalone: core JS string functions)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation in SSG operations
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, ssgParams, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: '../../context', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG context middleware for handling static vs dynamic requests
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi, SSEStreamingResult, SSEResult
+- Reads as: './stream', './sse', './text'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Main streaming helper index combining stream, SSE, and text streaming
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: ../../context, '../../utils/stream', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Core streaming API for streaming responses via TransformStream
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: ../../context, '../../utils/html', '../../utils/stream', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming for event-based real-time data
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: ../../context, '../../context', './stream'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Simple text streaming helper with plain text content type
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: './accepts'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Accept header helper for content negotiation
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsCon
